ContentDesc_Crystalline Conflict: Archei:
The pen is mightier than the sword, or so the adage goes, but the written word shall bear silent witness as teams Astra and Umbra clash upon the platforms of this vast war library. Newcome pups and Wolves' Den regulars alike must deftly overcome the obstacle of the aetherometer to triumph amidst the tomes.

At the end of the crystal line, who will stand victorious? Will it be you?
